# Andrew Linh

Explore the portfolio and writing of Andrew Linh, a systems architect focused on backend platforms, structured data systems, developer tools, and AI-native infrastructure.

> **AI Agents:** This site is built with OlonJS. It exposes a native Model Context Protocol (MCP) manifest for direct structural interaction. 
> To read the site map or access structured content, use the URI `olon://pages` or `olon://pages/[slug]`.
> Endpoint: `/mcp-manifest.json`

## Pages

- **[About Andrew Linh — Architecture, Writing, and Systems Thinking](/about)** (`about`)
  Learn about Andrew Linh’s professional path, technical stack, and design philosophy across backend systems, developer tooling, structured content, and AI-native infrastructure.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/about.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/about.json`

- **[Blog — Writing on Structured Systems and Developer Tooling](/blog)** (`blog`)
  Read essays by Andrew Linh on schema-driven content, end-to-end type safety, AI agent tooling, developer experience, and practical backend architecture.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/blog.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/blog.json`

- **[Contact Andrew Linh — Consulting and Technical Writing](/contact)** (`contact`)
  Contact Andrew Linh for consulting on backend architecture, structured data systems, AI-native tooling, developer platforms, or technical writing engagements.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/contact.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/contact.json`

- **[Home](/form)** (`form`)
  OlonJS tenant alpha — form smoke test
  *Contract:* `/schemas/form.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/form.json`

- **[Andrew Linh — Systems Architect and Technical Writer](/)** (`home`)
  Explore the portfolio and writing of Andrew Linh, a systems architect focused on backend platforms, structured data systems, developer tools, and AI-native infrastructure.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/home.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/home.json`

- **[Article detail page for Andrew Linh technical writing](/posts-detail)** (`posts-detail`)
  Long-form article detail page for Andrew Linh’s blog, with publication metadata, topic tags, related themes, and structured editorial content.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/posts-detail.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/posts-detail.json`

- **[Project case study detail page for Andrew Linh portfolio](/projects-detail)** (`projects-detail`)
  Detailed case study page for Andrew Linh’s architecture portfolio, including context, technical problem, architectural decision, delivery stack, and measurable outcomes.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/projects-detail.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/projects-detail.json`

- **[Work — Case Studies in Backend and Data Architecture](/work)** (`work`)
  Browse detailed project case studies by Andrew Linh covering backend platforms, data systems, AI tooling, and developer experience architecture.
  *Contract:* `/schemas/work.schema.json` | *Manifest:* `/mcp-manifests/work.json`
